targetUser: English-speaking readers looking for a legitimate way to access a known book
coreScenario: Enter a title, author, or ISBN and choose a reading path within one minute
primaryOutput: A sourced book result with a legitimate next action

visualAnchor.reason: Readers judge usefulness from the real cover, access state, source, and next action
visualAnchor.evidence: Search results reserve the strongest visual hierarchy for real book records and access actions

brandMemory: warm paper and deep forest ink
antiTemplateDirections: avoid fake social proof and empty marketing copy
avoid copying the-sky-then stars, glass, grayscale, typography, or layout

firstViewport.mustSee: brand promise, one search input, reading-path legend, and local shelf value
firstViewport.visualWeight: search and real result preview dominate; explanation remains compact

responsive.desktop1440: two-part catalog desk with search dominant and result rows exposing direct actions
responsive.tablet768: single-column flow with search and results before source transparency
responsive.mobile390: compact brand, full-width search action, direct result action, and single-column shelf

screenshotAssertions: 1440x900 explains input, output, and one primary action in the first viewport
768x1024 preserves search and result priority without overlap
390x844 has no horizontal overflow and keeps primary actions at least 44px
result state exposes access type before opening details
local shelf clearly states device-only storage
